title: hibiscus pumilus
intro: Hibiscus pumilus, also known as the dwarf hibiscus or rock hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant's leaves and flowers are used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of hibiscus pumilus include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of menopause. Hibiscus pumilus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
